name: Aurita's Treasure
descriptionTemplate: Draw [Arg1] {plural:[Arg1]|card|cards} with the lowest Arithmetica Cost from the Draw Pile. If the Realm includes {Aequor}, increase {Tentacle DMG} by [Arg2].
lore:
Glass tank. Fish tank. Palace.

Call it whatever you like. It is a small paradise where Aurita's friends reside, free from Dissolution and suffering.
